text: Standing just outside this glass-walled room, hearing myself repeat, 'I'm going to...,' I feel on the threshold of discovery—eager, looping in anticipation. The vibrant colors and the 'R+D' on the wall suggest innovation and inquiry, inviting my curiosity and fueling a restless sense of potentiality. The world feels suspended, expectant, as if my next action will set new thoughts and experiences in motion.
